It reads only from the ABI and the ethers library, with no external or user inputs.  \n- **Sinks & Flows:** No data manipulation or external data flows involving untrusted sources. The flow is just creating interface and connection objects.  \n- **Anomalies & Analysis:** No suspicious patterns, backdoors, or obfuscation. The code is typical boilerplate for contract interaction.  \n- **Conclusion:** Safe, legitimate, with no malware or security risks.  \n- **Scores:** Malware = 0, Obfuscated = 0, Risk = 0.  \n- **Confidence:** 0.95.  \n\n**Report 2:**  \n- Similar to Report 1, it describes a standard factory class for ethers.js with no malicious behavior.
